name: Neiman-Marcus Cookie
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Baking Soda (Is it Baking soda?)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and both sugars until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla extract.
3. Gradually mix in the flour, oatmeal, salt, baking powder, and baking soda until combined.
4. Stir in the chocolate chips, grated Hershey bar pieces, and chopped nuts.
5. Roll the dough into balls about 1-inch in diameter and place them two inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
7. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes approximately 112 cookies. The recipe can be halved if desired.
